creator: luttner@web.de
text:
Please add additional keymap german.iso.acc.kbd. This keymap would
be for dead keys. It has been supplied for other languages (french,
swissfrench, swissgerman, etc.) as well.

Fix: 

That would be just one additional file: german.iso.acc.kbd
in src/share/syscons/keymaps.
The Makefile in the src/share/syscons/keymaps has to be updated
as well. 

And there should be an entry to choose the map from kbdmap 
or /stand/sysinstall.


Here's my suggested keymap:
